name: Hot Roll Mix Cinnamon Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages HOT ROLL MIX (16 oz Boxes)
recipeInstructions:
1. MORE MILK MAY BE NEEDED TO MAKE FROSTING POURABLE.
2. COMBINE ROLL MIX, YEAST, EGG YOLKS, 2 CUPS VERY HOT WATER, 3/4 CUP SUGAR, AND 2 TBSP. MELTED BUTTER. MIX TO MAKE A SOFT DOUGH.
3. TURN OUT ONTO WELL FLOURED BOARD. KNEAD FOR ABOUT TWO MINUTES.
4. COVER AND LET REST FOR ABOUT 5 MINUTES.
5. ROLL OUT INTO A 20-INCH X 12-INCH RECTANGLE.
6. BRUSH WITH 2 TBSP. MELTED BUTTER.
7. SPRINKLE CINNAMON AND 1/4 CUP SUGAR OVER TOP.
8. FOLD DOUGH LENGTHWISE IN HALF.
9. ROLL ROLLED PIN OVER LIGHTLY TO SEAL EDGES.
10. CUT DOUGH INTO 3 STRIPS.
11. BRAID THE STRIPS TOGETHER.
12. IF DESIRED, PLACE A PECAN IN EACH FOLD.
13. COVER AND LET RISE FOR 20 TO 30 MINUTES, UNTIL SLIGHTLY PUFFY.
14. BAKE FOR 10 MINUTES AT 375 DEG F.
15. REDUCE HEAT TO 350 DEG F. AND BAKE FOR 20 MINUTES LONGER OR UNTIL GOLDEN BROWN.
16. COVER WITH FOIL THE LAST TEN MINUTES IF BROWNING TOO MUCH.
17. MAKE FROSTING BY COMBINING POWDERED SUGAR, VANILLA, AND MILK. POUR OVER TOP.
